DesignPlus is driven by a mission to guide our customers at every step of their interior design journey. From initiating the search for a competent interior designer to offering curated portfolios and insightful perspectives, we strive to ensure an enriching and seamless design experience. Our platform aims to facilitate a collaborative, transparent, and efficient design process that caters to the unique needs of homeowners and professionals alike.

DesignPlus is more than just an interior design platform. It serves as a comprehensive hub for the design and renovation industry, bringing together a diverse array of stakeholders including interior designers, contractors, suppliers, banks, and architects. By offering a unified, interactive space for these parties to connect, collaborate, and grow, we are creating a holistic interior design ecosystem that transforms how renovation projects are conceived, planned, and executed.

Beyond this, DesignPlus also provides opportunities for aspiring designers and professionals to join our team and contribute to our vision. With DesignPlus, everyone involved in the process of building a dream home can find the resources, support, and opportunities they need all in one place. We are here to reinvent the interior design journey, making it more accessible, enjoyable, and successful for all.

member-short-detail:
Allure Design Studio is an interior design firm dedicated to creating beautiful, functional, and inspiring spaces for our clients. Our team of experienced and skilled interior designers is committed to bringing your vision to life while providing exceptional customer service every step of the way.

At Allure Design Studio, we understand that every project is unique, and we take a personalized approach to design that ensures each project reflects the client's personality, style, and lifestyle. Whether you're looking to create a modern and sleek space or a traditional and elegant design, we work closely with you to bring your ideas to life.

Our interior design services include space planning, color consultation, furniture selection, lighting design, and more. We work with a lot of vendors to source out materials and finishes to create a space that is not only beautiful but also functional and durable.

At Allure Design Studio, we believe that good design is about more than just aesthetics; it's about creating a space that enhances your quality of life. We prioritize functionality, comfort, and livability in every project we undertake, ensuring that your new space is not only beautiful but also practical and enjoyable to use.

Our team of interior designers is dedicated to providing exceptional customer service, from the initial consultation to the final installation. We take the time to listen to your needs and desires, and we work tirelessly to create a design that exceeds your expectations.

In summary, Allure Design Studio is an interior design firm that is committed to creating beautiful, functional, and inspiring spaces that reflect our clients' unique personalities and lifestyles. We take a personalized approach to design, prioritizing functionality, comfort, and livability while providing exceptional customer service every step of the way.

member-short-detail:
Transforming Spaces, Enhancing Lives

2nd Phase Design was formed with the vision of helping you realized your ideas and create your dream home. Our vision is to be a one-stop Interior Design Centre, providing you with convenience and the most efficient way of creating your dream home. We provide you with outstanding customer service and quality workmanship, all at the reasonable price, without compromising on the standards.

Our mission is to create lifestyle homes for our clients. These homes adopt the aura of luxury and practicality. We strive in making our projects not just houses but homes that our clients want.

Our creative interior designers and dedicated project co-coordinators always place our customers; interests and satisfaction as their top priority. We provide a wide range of services, before during and post renovation to ensure total customer satisfaction. We believe in providing quality work because we are only satisfied when you are.

We specialize all major and minor building construction projects, addition & alterations projects and renovation projects. Design considerations include space planning, lighting, color and furniture as well as the final use of the space.
